# Aman Suryavanshi - AI Solutions Architect & Full-Stack Agentic Developer

> Specialized in Self-Healing Automation Architecture, Multi-LLM Orchestration, and Next.js AI Dashboards.

## Identity
Aman Suryavanshi is an India-based AI Solutions Architect and Full-Stack Agentic Developer. He builds production-grade n8n automation workflows with self-healing capabilities, Dead-Letter Queues (DLQ), and enterprise-grade reliability.

## Services
- **Self-Healing Automation Architecture**: n8n production workflows with 99.7% reliability and automated error recovery.
- **Multi-Agent Systems**: Development using LangGraph, CrewAI, and LangChain for complex task orchestration.
- **AI-Powered Web Apps**: Next.js 15 (App Router) dashboards integrated with Sanity CMS, Firebase, and Supabase.
- **Technical SEO/GEO**: Optimization for AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT) and Google Search Console.
- **Omni-Post Automation**: High-volume AI content engines for multi-platform distribution.

## Flagship Projects
- **Aviators Training Centre (ATC)**: Generated ₹300K+ revenue using a custom n8n + Next.js flight training platform.
  - URL: https://amansuryavanshi.me/projects/aviators-training-centre
- **Omni-Post AI Automation**: A 74-node complex n8n workflow for automated multi-platform content generation and distribution.
  - URL: https://amansuryavanshi.me/projects/n8n-automation-suite
  - Stat: 80% reduction in manual content operations.
- **Self-Healing GitHub Backup**: Enterprise-grade n8n workflow with 99.9% recovery rate and dual-stream webhook design.
  - URL: https://amansuryavanshi.me/projects/n8n-github-backup
- **Barkat Enterprise**: B2B e-commerce platform serving 3,000+ active users.
  - URL: https://amansuryavanshi.me/projects/barkat-enterprise

## Tech Stack
- **Automation**: n8n (Expert), LangGraph, CrewAI, Zapier, Make.
- **AI/LLM**: Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro, DeepSeek.
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
- **Backend/DB**: Node.js, Firebase, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Pinecone (Vector DB).
- **CMS/Tools**: Sanity, Notion API, Docker, Vercel, GitHub Actions.
